/events/10th-anniversary-party/.title: 10th Anniversary Party
/events/10th-anniversary-party/.description:
Celebrate a decade of Pokémon GO together during the 10th Anniversary Party!

The 10th Anniversary Party event will take place from July 4, 2026 at 10 am to July 6, 2026 at 8 pm.

/events/articuno-zapdos-moltres-in-5-sta.title: Articuno, Zapdos, and Moltres in 5-star Raid Battles
/events/articuno-zapdos-moltres-in-5-sta.description:
Articuno, Zapdos, and Moltres will be in five-star raid battles from July 1, 2026 to July 5, 2026.

Raid Hours

There will also be a Raid Hour featuring Articuno, Zapdos, and Moltres from 6:00 pm to 7:00 pm local time on the following date:

- July 1

/events/august-communityday2026/.title: August Community Day
/events/august-communityday2026/.description: The August Community Day event will take place on August 16, 2026 from 2 pm to 5 pm. Stay tuned for more details.

/events/happy-birthday-professor-willow-.title: Happy Birthday, Professor Willow!
/events/happy-birthday-professor-willow-.description:
Wish Professor Willow a very happy birthday with Professor Willow’s assistant Pikachu!

The Happy Birthday, Professor Willow! event will take place on July 21, 2026 from 10 am to 8 pm.

/events/hatch-day-august-2026/.title: Hatch Day
/events/hatch-day-august-2026/.description: The Hatch Day event will take place on August 8, 2026 from 11 am to 5 pm. Stay tuned for more details.

/events/july-communityday2026/.title: Sobble Community Day
/events/july-communityday2026/.description: Sobble, the Water Lizard Pokémon, will be featured during July Community Day!

/events/kyogre-in-5-star-raid-battles-ju.title: Kyogre in 5-star Raid Battles
/events/kyogre-in-5-star-raid-battles-ju.description:
Kyogre will be in five-star raid battles from July 15, 2026 to July 21, 2026.

Raid Hours

There will also be a Raid Hour featuring Kyogre from 6:00 pm to 7:00 pm local time on the following date:

- July 15

/events/kyurem-in-5-star-raid-battles-ju.title: Kyurem in 5-star Raid Battles
/events/kyurem-in-5-star-raid-battles-ju.description:
Kyurem will be in five-star raid battles from July 29, 2026 to August 4, 2026.

Raid Hours

There will also be a Raid Hour featuring Kyurem from 6:00 pm to 7:00 pm local time on the following date:

- July 29

/events/max-mondays-2026-07-06/.title: Dynamax Chansey during Max Monday
/events/max-mondays-2026-07-06/.description:
These Dynamax Pokemon may appear in Max Battles throughout this season. Max Battles will be available from 6:00 a.m. to 9:00 p.m. local time on Mondays.

- Power Spots will refresh more frequently.

- Additional Power Spots will be active on Mondays compared to the rest of the week.

- Max Battles will rotate to feature different Dynamax Pokemon.

On July 6, 2026, the featured Dynamax Pokemon is Chansey.

- Chansey

/events/max-mondays-2026-07-13/.title: Dynamax Deino during Max Monday
/events/max-mondays-2026-07-13/.description:
These Dynamax Pokemon may appear in Max Battles throughout this season. Max Battles will be available from 6:00 a.m. to 9:00 p.m. local time on Mondays.

- Power Spots will refresh more frequently.

- Additional Power Spots will be active on Mondays compared to the rest of the week.

- Max Battles will rotate to feature different Dynamax Pokemon.

On July 13, 2026, the featured Dynamax Pokemon is Deino.

- Deino

/events/max-mondays-2026-07-20/.title: Dynamax Trubbish during Max Monday
/events/max-mondays-2026-07-20/.description:
These Dynamax Pokemon may appear in Max Battles throughout this season. Max Battles will be available from 6:00 a.m. to 9:00 p.m. local time on Mondays.

- Power Spots will refresh more frequently.

- Additional Power Spots will be active on Mondays compared to the rest of the week.

- Trubbish

/events/max-mondays-2026-07-27/.title: Dynamax Feebas during Max Monday
/events/max-mondays-2026-07-27/.description:
These Dynamax Pokemon may appear in Max Battles throughout this season. Max Battles will be available from 6:00 a.m. to 9:00 p.m. local time on Mondays.

/events/mega-aggron-in-mega-raids-july-2.title: Mega Aggron in Mega Raids
/events/mega-aggron-in-mega-raids-july-2.description: Mega Aggron will be in Mega Raids from July 29, 2026 at 6 am to August 4, 2026 at 10 pm local time.

/events/mega-lucario-in-mega-raids-july-.title: Mega Lucario in Mega Raids - July 13
/events/mega-lucario-in-mega-raids-july-.description: Mega Lucario returns to Mega Raids from July 13, 2026 at 6 am to July 14, 2026 at 10 pm local time.

/events/mega-lucario-in-mega-raids-july-.title: Mega Lucario in Mega Raids
/events/mega-lucario-in-mega-raids-july-.description: Mega Lucario will be in Mega Raids from July 1, 2026 at 6 am to July 5, 2026 at 10 pm local time.

/events/mega-salamence-in-mega-raids-jul.title: Mega Salamence in Mega Raids
/events/mega-salamence-in-mega-raids-jul.description: Mega Salamence will be in Mega Raids from July 22, 2026 at 6 am to July 28, 2026 at 10 pm local time.

/events/mega-sceptile-in-mega-raids-july.title: Mega Sceptile in Mega Raids
/events/mega-sceptile-in-mega-raids-july.description: Mega Sceptile will be in Mega Raids from July 15, 2026 at 6 am to July 21, 2026 at 10 pm local time.

/events/ozone-ascent-2026/.title: Ozone Ascent
/events/ozone-ascent-2026/.description:
Complete Timed Research to encounter Rayquaza and more!

The Ozone Ascent event will take place from July 25, 2026 at 10 am to July 26, 2026 at 8 pm.

/events/pokemon-go-fest-2026-global/.title: Pokémon GO Fest 2026: Global
/events/pokemon-go-fest-2026-global/.description:
Join millions of Trainers across the globe for Pokémon GO Fest 2026: Global! This worldwide event takes place from July 11, 2026 at 10 am to July 12, 2026 at 7 pm local time.

For the first time, GO Fest: Global is free for all Trainers who log in during event weekend. Everyone can access the featured Special Research, event bonuses, and increased Shiny encounter opportunities at no cost.

/events/raichu-super-mega-raid-day-2026/.title: Raichu Super Mega Raid Day
/events/raichu-super-mega-raid-day-2026/.description: Sparks fly for Raichu Super Mega Raid Day!

/events/raid-day-august-2026/.title: Raid Day
/events/raid-day-august-2026/.description: The Raid Day event will take place on August 22, 2026 from 2 pm to 5 pm. Stay tuned for more details.

/events/raidhour20260715/.title: Kyogre Raid Hour
/events/raidhour20260715/.description: A Raid Hour featuring Kyogre is scheduled from 6 to 7 pm Local Time. During this hour there will be an increased number of 5-star Raids.

/events/raidhour20260722/.title: Solgaleo Raid Hour
/events/raidhour20260722/.description: A Raid Hour featuring Solgaleo is scheduled from 6 to 7 pm Local Time. During this hour there will be an increased number of 5-star Raids.

/events/raidhour20260729/.title: Kyurem Raid Hour
/events/raidhour20260729/.description: A Raid Hour featuring Kyurem is scheduled from 6 to 7 pm Local Time. During this hour there will be an increased number of 5-star Raids.

/events/road-of-legends-2026/.title: Road of Legends
/events/road-of-legends-2026/.description: The countdown to Pokémon GO Fest 2026: Global starts here! During the Road of Legends, Trainers around the world can gear up for the big weekend with a full week of powerful raid encounters, event bonuses, and GO Pass rewards. Whether you’re looking to strengthen your team, stock up on rewards, or take on some of Pokémon GO’s most formidable foes, this is your chance to get ready for the adventure ahead.

/events/shadow-palkia-in-shadow-raids-ju.title: Shadow Palkia in Shadow Raids
/events/shadow-palkia-in-shadow-raids-ju.description:
Shadow Palkia will appear in Pokemon GO in Shadow Raids. If you’re lucky you’ll be able to encounter Shiny Shadow Palkia!

Shadow Palkia will appear in five-star Shadow Raids every weekend from July 1 to August 4.

/events/solgaleo-in-5-star-raid-battles-.title: Solgaleo in 5-star Raid Battles
/events/solgaleo-in-5-star-raid-battles-.description:
Solgaleo will be in five-star raid battles from July 22, 2026 to July 28, 2026.

Raid Hours

There will also be a Raid Hour featuring Solgaleo from 6:00 pm to 7:00 pm local time on the following date:

- July 22

/events/special-anniversary-pikachu-cele.title: Special Anniversary Pikachu Celebration
/events/special-anniversary-pikachu-cele.description:
Keep the festivities going with three celebrations of different costumed Pikachu!

The Special Anniversary Pikachu Celebration event will take place from July 13, 2026 at 10 am to July 20, 2026 at 8 pm.
